function.name: SlicerOrbitSurgerySim
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for SlicerOrbitSurgerySim. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Orbit Model" section, choose Orbit Model node.; 'cb_step_2': In the "Plate model" section, choose the plate model node.; 'cb_step_3': In the "Orbit landmarks" section, choose the orbit landmarks node.; 'cb_step_4': In the "Plate landmarks" section, choose the plate landmarks node.; 'cb_step_5': Click "Initial registration" button.; 'cb_step_6': Click "Posterior stop and antero-posterior stops alignment" button.; 'cb_step_7': Tick the "Enable 3D interaction transform handle" checkbox.; 'cb_step_8': Manually adjust the position and rotation of the plate. (interactive: generic); 'cb_step_9': Click "Mark intersection" button.; 'cb_step_10': Click "Create Distance Heatmap" button.

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
